items.title: Audio scripts need story setup before analysis
items.summary: Show Scripts should explain what happened, who is involved, and why it matters before moving into analysis.
items.content_text: The strongest audio brief sections open with concrete events and listener relevance, then use host turns to clarify the story.

items.title: Second hosts should ask useful clarifying questions
items.summary: A second host should not just repeat the first host; they should ask short clarifying questions and add restrained reaction.
items.content_text: Two-host scripts work when the second host acts as a listener proxy and helps translate dense claims into spoken meaning.

items.title: Server rendering owns audio segmentation
items.summary: After Script Review, the submitted definition lets api derive render segments without creating a local segment manifest.
items.content_text: The Skill stops at reviewed Show Script and bundle inputs. Server rendering owns segmentation, retry, assembly, metadata, storage, and delivery.
